national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Dallas Gold & Silver Exchange
buyers.testing_transparency: Site does not describe its testing process; positions itself as a precious-metals exchange with in-store evaluation.
buyers.evidence_notes: Site states "Since 1978, Dallas Gold & Silver Exchange has been the premier destination in North Texas for buying and selling precious metals." Multiple DFW locations (Dallas, Frisco, Grand Prairie, Grapevine, Lewisville, Euless, Fort Worth); buys and sells fine jewelry, luxury watches, and bullion. Sell-gold subpage 404'd, so testing/fee fields stayed null rather than inferred.

buyers.name: Dallas Valley Goldmine
buyers.hours: By appointment only, 7 days a week
buyers.payout_claims: Claims to pay "almost 500% more than mailing it to Cash 4 Gold and up to 50% more than other local buyers"; cites an ABC News investigation
buyers.testing_transparency: Tests each piece in front of you: "We test each piece right in front of you" on "licensed, certified scales" visible to the customer; specific test method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: In business "since 2008" with 12 DFW appointment-only locations including Dallas, Addison, Plano, Allen, and Irving. Runs a mobile "Gold Buyer Concierge" program for customers 60+ or with disabilities. BBB A+ claimed on site. Comparison claims are their own, uncorroborated.

buyers.name: Diamond & Gold Exchange
buyers.payout_claims: "We Pay More for Gold & Jewelry" — claims "stronger offers than many competitors throughout the DFW area"; no percentages given
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "We test the purity, weigh each piece, and use the current gold market price to calculate your offer. Everything happens in front of you."
buyers.evidence_notes: Operating since 1978 ("more than 45 years"); team of "certified gemologists, appraisers, and diamond cutters"; "There is no cost and no obligation for a consultation." Also has Garland and Lewisville locations. Street address surfaced via its location pages, not the main contact page — confirm before publishing.

buyers.name: Gold Buyers of Plano
buyers.address: 601 W Parker Rd, Suite 115, Plano, TX 75023
buyers.payout_claims: "We Pay Up To Highest Payout of Market Price" (no percentage given)
buyers.testing_transparency: Evaluation process explained to customers per site testimonials; staff includes a GIA Certified Gemologist. No specific test method named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Site states "We are licensed and insured" and notes an "A rating from Better Business Bureau." Buys scrap gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, estate jewelry, watches, coins, and bullion.

buyers.name: Dinger's Gold & Silver
buyers.address: 3115 W. Parker Rd, Suite C540, Plano, TX 75023
buyers.testing_transparency: Site does not describe a testing method; emphasizes evaluation with "never any pressure to sell anything."
buyers.evidence_notes: "Local precious metals dealer since 2011," family owned and operated (Dinger family). Buys, sells, and trades gold and silver bullion, coin collections, scrap, flatware, and dental gold. Government-issued ID required for transactions; cash for most transactions, check or wire for large ones.

buyers.name: Hebron Jewelry Exchange, LLC dba Cash for Gold Jewelry Exchange
buyers.payout_claims: "we offer the highest bid"; explains it can pay more because "We don't scrap all of the jewelry that we buy, we also sell our diamonds & jewelry pieces directly to retailers"
buyers.testing_transparency: Site does not describe a testing method; offers "a free estimate whether you decide to sell gold, diamonds or any other jewelry to us or not."
buyers.evidence_notes: Legal name shown on site as Hebron Jewelry Exchange, LLC dba Cash for Gold Jewelry Exchange. Claims "combined experience of selling and buying diamonds of over 50 years." Buys fine jewelry, gems, precious metals, and coins. Hours not posted.

buyers.name: Gold & Silver Jewelry Exchange
buyers.address: 2050 N Stemmons Freeway, Suite 7303 Unit 303, Dallas, TX 75207
buyers.testing_transparency: Site does not describe its testing process.
buyers.evidence_notes: Located inside the Dallas World Trade Center building on Stemmons Freeway (Dallas Market Center jewelry district); buys and sells gold, silver, diamonds, and watches, and sells engagement rings at wholesale prices. Second location at 3242 Preston Rd, Plano.

buyers.name: KC Gold, Silver, & Rare Coins
buyers.address: 5201 S Colony Blvd, Suite #694, The Colony, TX 75056
buyers.testing_transparency: Site does not describe a specific testing method; emphasizes free in-store assessment with same-day cash.
buyers.evidence_notes: Independently owned bullion and rare-coin dealer claiming "over 30 years of hands-on experience"; site repeatedly states "no hidden fees" and "no pressure." Located in The Colony (north DFW suburb) with Dallas/Plano service pages. Hours not posted.

buyers.name: Uptown Gold & Silver Exchange
buyers.testing_transparency: Site does not describe its testing process.
buyers.evidence_notes: Site states "We are fully licensed and insured!" Buys gold, silver, estate jewelry, and bullion/coins; also does custom jewelry and repair. Uptown Dallas location. No hours or years-in-business posted; homepage copy is partly about a manufacturing partner.
